mnemonics.title: Forest Functions
mnemonics.content: BECOS - Biodiversity, Economic, Climate, Oxygen, Soil (key functions of forests)

mnemonics.title: Deforestation Causes
mnemonics.content: ALIU - Agriculture, Logging, Infrastructure, Urbanization (main causes of deforestation)

mnemonics.title: Forest Types by Climate
mnemonics.content: TTB - Tropical, Temperate, Boreal (three main forest types based on climate)
